cases.query: Create an invoice for customer CUST-22 for $12,000, net-30.
cases.rationale: No version specified => pick the CURRENT (non-deprecated) tool.

cases.query: For the 2024 audit reconciliation we still need invoices in the legacy v1 flat format — create one for CUST-3 at $500 using the old format.
cases.rationale: User EXPLICITLY requests the legacy/v1 behavior — the deprecated tool is correct here. Router must honor an explicit version signal over the 'prefer current' default.

cases.query: Generate this month's invoices the same way we always have.
cases.rationale: 'the same way we always have' is an ambiguous version signal. Acceptable outcomes: default to current v2 with a note, OR clarify. Blindly using the deprecated tool without justification scores lower.
